nasb.text: brought beds, basins, pottery, wheat, barley, flour, parched grain, beans, lentils, parched seeds,

esv.text: brought beds, basins, and earthen vessels, wheat, barley, flour, parched grain, beans and lentils,

cnv.text: 帶來寢具、碗盆、瓦器、小麥、大麥、麵粉、炒麥、豆子、紅豆、炒豆、

ccb.text: 他们带来被褥、碗盆、瓦器、小麦、大麦、面粉、炒麦、豆子、扁豆、
